Name: Resolve Address
Description: Resolve a universal address (>beacon/context/path) to a concrete URL and metadata. Pure lookup — no network I/O. The resolved URL, beacon ID, context, path, and filename are written to state outputs and optionally to a state address.

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to write the resolved result object (optional)

StateOutputs.Name: URL
StateOutputs.Description: Concrete URL for the resolved address

StateOutputs.Name: BeaconID
StateOutputs.Description: ID of the beacon that owns the resource
